prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Users report Kafka consumer groups drop membership with 'Heartbeat session timed out'. Find the Java source files in apache/kafka that (1) define the heartbeat session timeout threshold and (2) raise or log this timeout during the consumer polling loop.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the apache-kafka-ecosystem fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Users report Kafka consumer groups drop membership with 'Heartbeat session timed out'. Find the Java source files in apache/kafka that (1) define the heartbeat session timeout threshold and (2) raise or log this timeout during the consumer polling loop.
